title: Unique Brand Name
scenario: Create a unique brand name for a company that specializes in creating artisanal food products. The brand name should be memorable, easy to pronounce, and reflect the company's values.
constraints: Must be unique and not already in use

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluate the uniqueness of the brand name.
Assess if the brand name is easy to pronounce.
Assess if the brand name reflects the company's values.
